bottom_line: Tighten implementation-step prompts/templates so payload/UI contract changes must update adjacent legacy tests in-step, preventing downstream QV thrash.
coverage_notes: DB available (`iw item-status` used). Reviewed all F-00091 step reports in ai-dev/active/F-00091/reports. Sampled logs via targeted grep/tail across S17/S18/S19 and fix logs; full reads for short fix logs (S17_fix2, S13_fix1). No >1MB full-log deep read beyond targeted failure sections.

findings.title: Contract-change steps deferred legacy test updates to downstream gates
findings.recommendation: Add prompt-template checklist text requiring same-step update/retirement of all tests affected by payload/DOM contract changes.
evidence: ai-dev/logs/F-00091_S17_run1.log:1802 — 'Failed F-00091 step S17: frontend-tests failed: exit=2'
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Add a contract-change checklist to implementation prompt templates requiring in-step updates to legacy tests affected by payload/DOM changes; observed in F-00091 self-assess (ai-dev/work/F-00091/reports/F-00091_self_assess_report.md).

findings.title: Browser verification reliability depended on ad-hoc fixture readiness
findings.recommendation: Standardize qv-browser prompt/design preflight with explicit fixture readiness assertions for all required state branches before running V checks.
evidence: ai-dev/logs/F-00091_S19_run1.log:11 — '"Could not reliably verify per-project active-tab restore and post-reload persistence in same stable session."'
ai-dev/active/F-00091/reports/F-00091_S19_QvBrowser_report.md:16 — 'Known-context numeric `%` branch was not available from current seed'
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Add qv-browser fixture-readiness preflight requirements (including known/unknown branch coverage prerequisites) to workflow skill/template guidance; observed in F-00091 self-assess (ai-dev/work/F-00091/reports/F-00091_self_assess_report.md).

findings.title: Behavior-step RED evidence format is inconsistently enforced
findings.recommendation: Require a mandatory tdd_red_evidence field in behavior-step reports with a plausible behavioral failure snippet.
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Enforce mandatory tdd_red_evidence in implementation report templates/validators for behavior steps, with real behavioral-failure snippets; observed in F-00091 self-assess (ai-dev/work/F-00091/reports/F-00091_self_assess_report.md).
